q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares observed campaign AOV to non-campaign AOV with an explicit ~23.2% deviation in the correct direction (campaign < non-campaign), matching an expected 10-25% range cited as internal documentation.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports both AOVs (12,616.93 vs 9,693.25 JPY) and sample sizes (1,834 vs 484), and gives a clear verdict that the data supports the hypothesis.
